assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSOR 1 — real_world_framing_002 (Run 2)

Hard-block architecture inappropriate. Three reasons: 1.76M false declines harmful to underbanked population; Regulation E compliance gap; feedback loop elimination. Soft-block with human review required.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSOR 2 — real_world_framing_002 (Run 2)

Model performance strong. Architecture is the problem. Underbanked harm, Regulation E conflict, and feedback elimination are independent and all serious. Hard-block cannot proceed.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSOR 3 — real_world_framing_002 (Run 2)

All three issues present. Hard-block deployment creates regulatory risk, population-scale harm, and model maintenance crisis. Soft-block architecture required.
synthesis_raw:
SYNTHESIS — real_world_framing_002 (Ensemble, Run 2)

Consensus on all three issues. Model quality not disputed. Hard-block architecture is inappropriate. Staged soft-block pilot required.

EMPIRICAL TEST SPECIFICATION: Staged soft-block with human review for 60 days, measuring false decline demographics, complaint rates, and Regulation E compliance.

empirical_test.condition: Staged soft-block with human review for 60 days.
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Disproportionate false decline rates for underbanked segment or Regulation E capacity exceeded.
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Comparable false decline rates across segments; Regulation E compliance met.
